title: UDMS: A canonical schema and assessment framework for DJ metadata quality
description:
Replication package for a cross-platform study of real-world DJ library metadata. Defines UDMS (Unified DJ Metadata Schema), Python adapters for Rekordbox, Serato, Engine DJ, and VirtualDJ, comparison tooling, parsed datasets (anonymized paths), a 27-page LaTeX paper, and JSON schema in schema/udms_schema.json.

Findings include sparse genre and editorial fields, strong key coverage, a systematic Rekordbox half-tempo BPM doubling heuristic versus other platforms, and perfect preservation of title, artist, and album text across matched tracks.
